title: Energy Income Weekly: Rallying Into The End Of 2022
text: Commodity-exposed energy stocks led the way higher. Small-cap MLPs took a beating.

title: 4 Stocks With Impressive Interest Coverage Ratio to Invest In
text: A company that is capable of generating earnings well above its interest expense can withstand financial hardship. Companies such as Herc Holdings (HRI), ONEOK (OKE), O'Reilly Automotive (ORLY) and Fortinet (FTNT) are capable of meeting financial obligations.

title: The $100,000 Market-Crushing HIGH-Yield Portfolio
text: In this article, I discuss my $100,000 high-yield model portfolio, which comes with both a high yield and high dividend growth. The portfolio not only confirms theoretical expectations, but also blows them out of the water as it crushes the market with subdued volatility - all while offering a high yield.

title: Buy 5 Stocks With Upgraded Broker Ratings for the New Year
text: As brokers have a deeper insight into stocks, one must follow rating upgrades for solid returns. We pick Chefs' Warehouse (CHEF), Synopsys (SNPS), Enphase Energy (ENPH), ONEOK (OKE) and Fabrinet (FN) as these witness rating upgrades.

title: 3 Reasons Growth Investors Will Love Oneok (OKE)
text: Oneok (OKE) is well positioned to outperform the market, as it exhibits above-average growth in financials.

title: ONEOK: Robust Financials And An Attractive Dividend Yield
text: Rising energy prices have provided tailwinds to Oneok's earnings and operations. Positive demand outlook for NGLs and natural gas bodes well for Oneok's continued growth.

title: ONEOK: A Clear Beneficiary Of The Russia-Europe Problem
text: ONEOK, Inc. stated that it expects strength in producer activity and increased volumes and higher earnings in a favorable commodity price environment. ONEOK has a history of paying dividends and currently offers a dividend yield of 5.9%.

title: These Were the 5 Best and Worst Performing Energy Stocks in November 2022
text: Unlike most other sectors, the energy sector has performed well this year. Russia's invasion of Ukraine pushed up oil and gas prices initially.

title: Why Is Oneok (OKE) Up 13.3% Since Last Earnings Report?
text: Oneok (OKE) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?
